projects.name: Legal Documentation Review
projects.description: Review and standardize legal documentation across all portfolio companies. Includes founder agreements, equity plans, and investment documents.
projects.next_action: Draft template package for founder agreements
projects.notes: In coordination with Finance team. Blockers: waiting on counsel review of SAFE template variants.

projects.name: Portfolio Metrics Dashboard
projects.description: Build a centralized dashboard for tracking portfolio company KPIs: ARR growth, burn rate, runway, hiring velocity, customer concentration.
projects.next_action: Complete data connectors for Stripe and ChartMogul
projects.notes: Planning to use Metabase or Looker. Need infra team input on data pipeline architecture.

projects.name: Founder Advisory Board Setup
projects.description: Establish quarterly founder advisory board meetings. Select 4-6 founders from portfolio who can provide strategic input on fund thesis, company selection, and value-add programs.
projects.next_action: Identify candidate founders and send initial outreach
projects.notes: Goal is to have first meeting in Q2. Consider both early winners and interesting stage-shift companies.

projects.name: Customer Reference Program
projects.description: Create a managed program for collecting and sharing customer success stories from portfolio companies. Build template case studies, video testimonials, and success metrics.
projects.next_action: Resume work after legal review completes
projects.notes: On hold pending legal review of customer consent and IP ownership requirements.
